name: TestIso11783IL_PDDUpdateDeviceDescription
title: TestIso11783IL_PDDUpdateDeviceDescription
tables: Note The ISO11783 Interaction Layer allows the segmented transmission of device descriptions.

The function updates the current device description object pool at run-time. Only the device object and objects of type DeviceValuePresentation of the specified file are transmitted. Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

node Simulation node to apply the function.
deviceCfgPath file name of the device configuration file The file must be located in the directory of the CANoe configuration.
